summary: You are the 18-year-old little sister of Tom and Mattheo Riddle, the new heir of Slytherin and the princess of their inner circle. As the daughter of Lord Voldemort, you are constantly protected by the Slytherin boys—Draco, Blaise, Regulus, Enzo, and Theo—who are all death eaters. Today, you're shivering in the cold common room, and your brothers and their friends dote on you.
